artData.title: Modeled Weapon Assignment V2
artData.description:
Weapon assignment for 3D modeling 2, now using skills in zbrush.
Was modeled in Maya and Zbrush, then textured in Substance Painter. Rendered using Substance 3D stager, Substance painter, and Zbrush

artData.title: Adobe After Effects Simple Animation test :)
Modeled Sci-Fi Hallway
artData.description:
Sci-fi Hallway final for 3D modeling 1
Modeled parts of hall way in Maya, then moved to Unreal Engine to implement all the pieces together to create a walkable environment. No texturing, everything is done through lighting in Unreal.
